hook.say: David Chase just announced a Sopranos masterclass.
hook.show: David Chase just announced a SOPRANOS MASTERCLASS.

lines.say: The Sopranos creator headlines the Karlovy Vary Film Festival this July.
lines.show: The SOPRANOS creator headlines the Karlovy Vary Film Festival this July.

lines.say: His session is "The Sopranos and Beyond: David Chase on Storytelling."
lines.show: His session is "The Sopranos and Beyond: David Chase on Storytelling."

lines.say: Jude Law's Riff Raff Entertainment also gets a spotlight.
lines.show: Jude Law's RIFF RAFF ENTERTAINMENT also gets a spotlight.

lines.say: Co-founder Ben Jackson and Katie Sinclair will participate.
lines.show: Co-founder Ben Jackson and Katie Sinclair will participate.

lines.say: The festival expands with new Book-to-Screen and microdrama programs.
lines.show: The festival expands with new Book-to-Screen and microdrama programs.

lines.say: This means more opportunities for diverse storytelling methods.
lines.show: This means more opportunities for diverse storytelling methods.

lines.say: Full story at The Screen Report — link in bio.
lines.show: Full story at The Screen Report — link in bio.

captions.instagram:
David Chase is bringing The Sopranos to the Karlovy Vary Film Festival! Get ready for a masterclass in storytelling and a spotlight on Jude Law's Riff Raff Entertainment. Details in the video!

#TheSopranos #DavidChase #KarlovyVary #FilmFestival #JudeLaw #RiffRaffEntertainment #HollywoodNews #TVSeries #Entertainment
captions.facebook: Huge news for fans of The Sopranos! Creator David Chase is holding a masterclass at the Karlovy Vary Film Festival. Plus, Jude Law's production company is getting a special focus. What do you hope to learn from Chase?

pinterest.title: David Chase Teaches Sopranos Masterclass at Karlovy Vary
pinterest.description: The Sopranos creator David Chase is headlining a storytelling masterclass at the Karlovy Vary International Film Festival. The event also spotlights Jude Law's Riff Raff Entertainment. Discover new Book-to-Screen and microdrama programs expanding the festival's scope. Find out all the details on this major industry event!

youtube.title: Sopranos Creator David Chase Teaches Masterclass at Karlovy Vary #Shorts
youtube.description: David Chase, creator of The Sopranos, is leading a major storytelling session at the Karlovy Vary Film Festival, with Jude Law's Riff Raff also in focus.

captions.x: David Chase is holding a Sopranos masterclass at Karlovy Vary! Jude Law's Riff Raff Entertainment also gets a spotlight. Major news for TV fans. #TheSopranos #FilmFestival

spoken: David Chase just announced a Sopranos masterclass. The Sopranos creator headlines the Karlovy Vary Film Festival this July. His session is "The Sopranos and Beyond: David Chase on Storytelling." Jude Law's Riff Raff Entertainment also gets a spotlight. Co-founder Ben Jackson and Katie Sinclair will participate. The festival expands with new Book-to-Screen and microdrama programs. This means more opportunities for diverse storytelling methods. Full story at The Screen Report — link in bio.
